details.test: Task 1: Find and save two recruiting Phase II–III lung cancer trials near Chicago
Task 2: Compare two trials and shortlist the one with fewer clinic visits per month
Task 3: Run eligibility check and save draft inquiry for first recommended trial
Task 4: Find closest telehealth non-chemo trial near Chicago and bookmark it
Task 5: Set up weekly email alerts for prostate cancer near ZIP 30301
Task 6: Find trial with travel assistance and highest stipend near Chicago and add a note
Task 7: Create personalized list of three questions for a trial and save to notes
Task 8: Add Phase III lung cancer trial results to reading list
Task 9: Switch to Spanish and favorite colon cancer patient guide
